en: I don't have to wear it or anything. Hi, Will.
ko: 모자야. 꼭 써야 하는 건 아니야.

en: You haven't slept with her, have you? That is a cheap question, and the answer is, of course, no comment.
ko: 와인, 자기야. 그녀와 잤던 거 아니지?

en: No comment means yes. No, it doesn't. Do you ever masturbate? Definitely no comment.
See, it means yes. Oh, my God.
ko: 봐, 그건 예라는 뜻이야. 오, 세상에.

en: So, uh, tell me, um, Anna, what do you do?
ko: 그래서, 어, 말해줘, 음, 안나, 너 뭐 해?

en: I'm an actress. Oh, splendid. What do you do?
I'm actually in the stock market myself, so, uh, not really similar fields.
ko: 나는 사실 주식 시장에 있어, 그래서, 음, 별로 비슷한 분야는 아니야.

en: Though, um, I have done the odd bit of amateur stuff.
ko: 그래도, 음, 가끔 아마추어 활동은 해봤어.

en: Um, PG Woodhouse, uh, farce, all that, you know.
Careful there, Vicar. Always imagined it's a pretty tough job, though, acting.
ko: 우드하우스, 음, 희극, 그런 거, 알지? 조심해, 목사님.

en: I mean, the wages are a scandal, aren't they? They can be.
I see friends from university, clever chaps. Been in the business longer than you.
